company: InApp Information Technologies India Pvt Ltd
job_description:
The Role

We are building enterprise data governance solutions for tomorrow. At the heart of our ambition is to codify the enterprise data model and build auto healing and remediation capabilities based on insights gained from such a model. We call this the Enterprise Knowledge Graph.

Core Responsibilities:

  • Model Development: Design and deploy Machine Learning models, specifically focusing on Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and their variants for B2B and B2C use cases.
  • MLOps & Deployment: Manage the end-to-end ML lifecycle using platforms such as Azure Machine Learning, AWS SageMaker, or Google Cloud.
  • Data Engineering: Handle large, complex datasets to support model training and enterprise-scale insights.
  • Collaboration: Work alongside the product team and clients to deliver inventive solutions with high attention to detail.

Technical Qualifications:

  • Programming: Mastery of Python is a necessity.
  • Frameworks: Deep experience with TensorFlow or PyTorch.
  • NLP & LLMs: Proficiency in integrating Large Language Model (LLM) frameworks like LangChain for Natural Language Processing (NLP) applications is highly desirable.
  • Data Expertise: Proven experience in data engineering with complex enterprise datasets.

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at careers@inapp.com.
summary: Design and deploy ML models for enterprise data governance. Collaborate with clients to solve data challenges using cloud platforms and NLP frameworks.

job_description:
Job Title

Content Writer (2-4 Years)

Company Name

NewAgeSys IT, (a division of NewAgeSys, Inc.)

Location

Carnival Infopark, Phase 2, Kakkanad, Kochi

Job Type

Onsite

Shift Timing

11 AM - 8 PM IST, Monday to Friday

About Us

We are a growing technology company with strong foundations in mobile and web development, and an established focus on Artificial Intelligence. Our AI team is actively building intelligent, scalable, and data-driven solutions that enhance digital products across multiple domains. As we continue to expand our AI capabilities, we are looking for a passionate AI/ML Engineer to join our existing team and contribute to designing, developing, and deploying machine learning solutions that create real value for our clients and end users.

What We’re Looking For

  • 2+ years of experience in content writing (preferably IT/tech domain)
  • Familiar with Google Helpful Content, E-A-T, and E-E-A-T updates
  • Experience in SEO writing, Keyword optimization, technical writing, and sales documents

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at career@newagesysindia.com
summary: Content Writer with 2-4 years of experience in IT/tech domain, specializing in SEO, technical writing, and creating marketing/internal documentation.

job_description:
Senior Human Resource Manager

Roles and Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate with hiring managers to understand staffing requirements and develop effective recruitment strategies aligned with business goals.
  • Source, screen, and select candidates through multiple channels, including job portals, social media, referrals, and networking.
  • Manage the end-to-end recruitment process, including interview coordination, candidate assessments, reference checks, offer negotiation, offer release, and induction.
  • Maintain accurate and up-to-date recruitment documentation, including job descriptions, candidate records, interview feedback, and hiring reports.
  • Act as a primary point of contact for employees regarding HR-related matters, including policy clarification, conflict resolution, and grievance handling.
  • Ensure compliance with applicable labor laws, company policies, and regulatory requirements, while maintaining proper documentation for audits and legal purposes.
  • Handle employee relations issues by conducting investigations into complaints, as well as organizing employee engagement activities and necessary training programs.
  • Support the development, implementation, and administration of compensation and benefits programs.
  • Conduct salary benchmarking and market analysis to ensure competitive and equitable compensation practices.
  • Prepare and maintain HR documentation, including employee records, legal documents, policy documents, disciplinary actions, and performance-related reports.

Desired Candidate Profile:

  • Master’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
  • Proven experience as an HR Executive or similar role, preferably in a senior capacity.
  • In-depth knowledge of HR principles, practices, and regulations.
  • Strong understanding of recruitment and selection processes.
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills.

Perks and Benefits:

  • Unlimited and swift career growth for performing candidates
  • A fun, young, and vibrant team to work with
  • Exposure to international clients and world-class work culture
  • Relocation support to outstation candidates

Location:

  • InfoPark, Koratty, Thrissur, Kerala
  • Shift: 9:00 am to 6:00 pm

Contact:

For applications, email your resume to careers@mapletechspace.com.
summary: Senior HR Manager to oversee recruitment, employee relations, and compliance. Requires 2-4 years of experience with expertise in HR practices and strategic recruitment.

job_description:
About Lean Transition Solutions (LTS)

Lean Transition Solutions (LTS) is a global Operational Excellence and Lean Industry 4.0 software company headquartered in the UK. For over a decade, we’ve helped large organizations turn strategy into action by combining Lean thinking, leadership principles, and modern, scalable technology. We are proud to be trusted by leading global organizations, supporting them in building sustainable, people-centric transformation at scale.

With teams across India, Europe, the US, the Middle East, and Mexico, we operate as one connected global team. At LTS, we believe technology strengthens people, enabling them to do their best work. That belief shapes our products, our culture, and how we work together.

Location: Technopark Phase 1, Trivandrum

Role Overview

We are seeking a detail-oriented Business Analyst with 1–2 years of experience to gather, analyze, and document business requirements for web and mobile applications. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in requirement elicitation, process mapping, and user story creation, and will work closely with stakeholders, product managers, and development teams to deliver scalable, high-quality software solutions aligned with business objectives.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Requirement Gathering and Analysis:
  2. Collaborate with stakeholders (clients, product owners) to understand needs.
  3. Translate business requirements into detailed functional specifications.

  4. Organize workshops, interviews, or surveys to collect requirements.

  5. Process Mapping and Documentation:

  6. Create flowcharts, diagrams, or process maps for workflows and system processes.

  7. Document As-Is (current state) and To-Be (future state) processes.

  8. Liaison Between Business and Development Teams:

  9. Act as a bridge between non-technical stakeholders and technical teams.

  10. Explain technical details in simple terms and ensure developers understand business goals.

  11. Creating User Stories and Use Cases:

  12. Write detailed user stories or use cases for end-user interactions.

  13. Clarify acceptance criteria for features and functionalities.

  14. Facilitating Meetings and Sprint Planning:

  15. Organize and lead requirement review meetings, sprint planning, and retrospectives.

  16. Ensure alignment between business and technical teams during the SDLC.

  17. Assisting in User Acceptance Testing (UAT):

  18. Coordinate UAT by creating test scenarios and addressing defects.

  19. Change Management and Impact Analysis:

  20. Perform impact analysis on client/stakeholder changes.

  21. Communicate risks, benefits, and effects of changes.

  22. Market Research and Competitor Analysis:

  23. Conduct research to understand industry trends and ensure product relevance.

Required Skills

  1. Understanding of Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC): Learn Agile, Scrum, or Waterfall methodologies.
  2. Stakeholder Management: Build relationships and manage expectations.
  3. Requirements Elicitation Techniques: Master interviews, workshops, wireframing, etc.
  4. Documentation Skills: Clear writing for BRDs, FRS, and user stories.
  5. Tools and Software: Proficiency in Jira, Confluence, Visio, Balsamiq, Trello.
  6. Communication and Presentation: Convey ideas to technical/non-technical audiences.
  7. Problem-Solving and Analytical Thinking: Propose solutions aligned with business goals.
  8. Handling Ambiguity and Change: Adapt to fast-paced environments with shifting priorities.
  9. Testing and QA: Coordinate UAT and ensure requirements are tested.
  10. Business Domain Knowledge: Acquire industry-specific insights for informed decisions.

Why You’ll Love Working With Us

  • Meaningful Work with Global Impact: Contribute to platforms used by Philips, Hitachi, Pfizer, and more.
  • People-First, Collaborative Culture: Ideas are heard, work is valued, and teams are supported.
  • Purpose-Driven Technology: Build solutions solving real operational and leadership challenges.
  • Growth & Ownership: Continuous learning, ownership of work, and career growth.
  • Global Exposure, Human Connection: Work with diverse teams and clients worldwide.
  • Quality, Security & Trust: ISO-certified platforms with a commitment to quality and data security.

Build a Strong Future Together

At LTS, we build long-term relationships and a sustainable future for our people, clients, and organization. We offer continuous learning, career development, and a supportive environment with competitive benefits.

Interested candidates may forward their detailed resume to: Email: careers@ltslean.com Subject: Application for Business Analyst/ BA

Include in the email content: - Total Relevant Experience - Current CTC - Expected CTC - Notice Period - Current Location - Willingness to work at office
summary: Detail-oriented Business Analyst with 1–2 years of experience in requirement gathering, process mapping, and bridging business and technical teams. Global impact and collaborative culture at a certified, people-first tech company.

job_description:
DeviceDriven (India) Pvt. Ltd Location: Padmanabham, Technopark Campus, Trivandrum, 695581 Website: www.devicedriven.com Closing Date: 02 June 2026 Job Published: 02 May 2026 Contact Email: jobs@devicedriven.com

Brief Description

DeviceDriven is driving a fintech-led digital transformation initiative to modernize a global-scale transaction and engagement platform. This platform enables millions of secure, real-time transactions across travel, retail, and digital assets, leveraging cloud-native architecture, microservices, and AI-powered intelligence to deliver scalable, data-driven experiences.

What You’ll Work On

  • Re-architecting and enhancing core transaction modules (payment flows, partner integrations, data pipelines)
  • Building AI-assisted APIs for personalization, fraud prevention, and dynamic decisioning
  • Leveraging cloud platforms for scalable compute, messaging, analytics, and data infrastructure
  • Using Generative AI tools (OpenAI, GitHub Copilot, Claude) to accelerate development
  • Implementing real-time observability systems for insights across partners, customers, and transactions

Preferred Skills

Required Experience

  • 6–12 years in backend development (Spring Boot + Cloud required)

Core Responsibilities

  • Build/Enhance backend services for earning, redemption, and partner integrations
  • Implement RESTful APIs with real-time messaging/event handling
  • Integrate cloud services for storage, queuing, observability, and analytics
  • Contribute to CI/CD pipelines for deployment resilience and cost efficiency
  • Use AI tools (Copilot, Codex, Claude) for code generation, tests, and documentation
  • Participate in data-driven monitoring and reporting metrics
  • Collaborate with frontend, QA, and data analytics teams

Technical Expertise

  • Languages & Frameworks: Java 11+, Spring Boot, JPA, Hibernate, Maven/Gradle
  • Cloud & Infra: AWS, GCP, and associated services
  • Messaging: Kafka, SQS/SNS, RabbitMQ, event streaming, pub/sub design
  • Automation & DevOps: Docker, Jenkins, Terraform, GitHub Actions
  • Testing: JUnit, Mockito, Testcontainers, Postman, pipeline integration testing
  • AI Productivity: GitHub Copilot, Codex, Claude, and AI tools/services
  • Analytics: Expose API metrics for reporting, connect backend logs to BI/monitoring
  • Security: IAM roles, OAuth2/JWT, encryption at rest & transit

Bonus Experience

  • Real-time analytics and BI dashboards
  • Fraud/risk analytics and personalization APIs
  • NoSQL + SQL coexistence patterns in microservices

What You’ll Gain

  • Direct exposure to production-grade, scalable cloud systems
  • Experimentation with AI-assisted development tools
  • End-to-end product lifecycle visibility (architecture, implementation, delivery)
  • Growth opportunities into lead/architect roles in a high-impact fintech ecosystem

How to Apply

Send your resume, GitHub/LinkedIn profile, and a short introduction to: jobs@devicedriven.com
summary: Senior Java Developer role at DeviceDriven, building scalable fintech platforms using cloud-native tech and AI tools. Focus on backend services, real-time analytics, and cross-functional collaboration in a high-impact fintech ecosystem.

job_description:

Company: Eartheye Space Private Limited Location: STPI Building, Technopark, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India Closing Date: 30 May 2026 Contact Email: apply@eartheye.space

Role Overview

The Senior DevMLOps Engineer at Eartheye Space is pivotal in building and maintaining sophisticated pipelines to support product differentiation. As a fast-paced organization, you will ensure timely delivery of well-orchestrated, observable pipelines and collaborate closely with software and computer vision/machine learning engineers.

Key Responsibilities

  • Administer multiple AWS environments.
  • Design and manage DevOps, MLOps pipelines, and tooling.
  • Implement strong security administration (DevSecOps).
  • Demonstrate expert knowledge in Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) and containerized application deployment.
  • Write expert-level Python code.
  • Database administration is a plus.

Why Join Eartheye Space?

  • Cutting-edge technology: Work on groundbreaking Earth observation technologies and datasets in a cloud environment.
  • Career growth: Join a rapidly growing company with numerous opportunities for advancement.
  • Employee equity: Access early-stage equity and stock options with potential for significant value growth.
  • Global mobility: Transfer opportunities as the company expands internationally.
  • Mission-driven: Build a high-performing company focused on customer satisfaction, team excellence, innovative products, and stellar results.

Preferred Skills

  • 3+ years managing mission-critical applications with 99.99% uptime.

  • Ability to solve complex problems under tight timelines.
  • Strong attention to detail, research-driven mindset, and self-motivation.

  • Excellent communication skills in spoken and written English.

Apply via: apply@eartheye.space

job_description:
GENROBOTIC INNOVATIONS (P) Ltd

Address: Thejaswini Building, Technopark, Trivandrum, Kerala, India, 695581 Website: http://www.genrobotics.org

Software Engineer (3 Years)

Closing Date: 20, May 2026 Job Published: 02, May 2026 Contact Email: career@genrobotics.org

Brief Description

We are seeking a Software Engineer with 3 years of hands-on experience in Python, C, and C++ to join our robotics engineering team. The role involves contributing to the development, modification, and enhancement of Genrobotic’s robotic product lines, focusing on control software, embedded systems, and application-level modules. The ideal candidate will demonstrate strong problem-solving skills, the ability to work independently and collaboratively, and a commitment to writing clean, maintainable, and well-tested code.

Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain software modules for robotic platforms using Python, C, and C++.
  • Contribute to software for robotic controllers, including sensor integration, motor control, and real-time communication.
  • Participate in modification, upgrade, and feature development for existing products.
  • Write clean, well-documented, and testable code; perform unit testing, debugging, and code reviews.
  • Collaborate with hardware, mechanical, and product teams to translate requirements into robust software solutions.
  • Optimize software for performance, reliability, and safety in real-world robotic deployments.
  • Maintain technical documentation and provide progress updates to the engineering lead.

Preferred Skills

  • Strong proficiency in Python, C, and C++
  • Experience with embedded/firmware development, data structures, algorithms, Git, Linux, debugging tools.
  • Knowledge of robotics frameworks (ROS) is a plus.
  • Added Advantage: Prior experience in robotics, embedded C/C++ on microcontrollers (STM32/ESP32/Raspberry Pi), real-time systems, and familiarity with communication protocols (UART, SPI, I2C, CAN, TCP/IP).

Qualifications

  • B.E / B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics, or related engineering discipline.
  • M.Tech / specialization in Embedded Systems, Robotics, or Software Engineering is preferred.
  • Experience: 3 years of relevant software development
  • Job Location: Technopark, Thiruvananthapuram

For those interested in this position: Click here to Apply
summary: A Software Engineer with 3+ years of Python/C/C++ experience is needed to develop robotic software, collaborate across teams, and ensure clean, reliable code for Genrobotic Innovations.

job_description:
GENROBOTIC INNOVATIONS (P) Ltd

Location: Thejaswini Building, Technopark, Trivandrum, Kerala, India, 695581 Website: http://www.genrobotics.org Contact Email: career@genrobotics.org

Job Title: Control System Engineer

Experience Required: 2-3 Years Closing Date: 28, May 2026 Job Published: 02, May 2026

Brief Description

Genrobotics is seeking a Control System Engineer with hands-on experience in BLDC motor operation and management to support R&D and product development. The role involves motor control implementation, testing, tuning, and system integration for electromechanical and rehabilitation devices. Candidates should be proactive, quality-focused, and thrive in a fast-paced, innovation-driven environment with a strong sense of ownership over product delivery and continuous improvement.

Responsibilities

  • Operate, manage, and test BLDC motors for various applications.
  • Develop, implement, and tune motor control algorithms and drive systems.
  • Perform performance evaluation, validation, and troubleshooting of motor systems.
  • Integrate BLDC motors with embedded systems, sensors, and control hardware.
  • Support system-level testing, debugging, and optimization.
  • Prepare technical documentation, test reports, and performance analysis.
  • Collaborate with mechanical, electronics, and R&D teams for product development.
  • Ensure compliance with safety and quality standards during testing and deployment.
  • Develop and maintain C/C++ code for control system implementation.

Preferred Skills

  • Experience with BLDC motors, motor drivers, and control systems.
  • Knowledge of motor control techniques, embedded systems, and controller tuning.
  • Hands-on experience in testing, troubleshooting, and system integration.
  • Familiarity with MATLAB/Simulink, microcontrollers, or relevant control tools.
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and documentation skills.
  • Good to have knowledge of model-based design methodologies and simulation tools (HIL, SIL, PIL).
  • Proficiency in C/C++ programming.
  • Experience in robotic medical rehabilitation projects is an added advantage.

Added Advantage

  • Knowledge of motor control techniques (PWM, PID control, speed/torque control).
  • Experience with motor drivers, encoders, sensors, and embedded control systems.
  • Basic understanding of control system design and tuning.
  • Familiarity with microcontrollers (Arduino, STM, PIC) and interfacing techniques.
  • Ability to perform system integration and validation testing.
  • Experience with microcontroller and microprocessor programming.
  • Knowledge of signal processing techniques.
  • Experience with control systems in the robotics industry.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s/Master’s degree in Electrical, Electronics, Control Systems, Mechatronics, or related fields.
  • 2-3 Years of experience.
  • Job Location: Technopark, Trivandrum.

Application Link: Click here to Apply
summary: Control System Engineer with 2-3 years of experience required to develop and implement BLDC motor control systems, integrating with embedded hardware and collaborating across R&D teams for robotics and rehabilitation devices.

job_description:
GENROBOTIC INNOVATIONS (P) Ltd

Location: Thejaswini Building, Technopark, Trivandrum, Kerala, India, 695581 Website: http://www.genrobotics.org Contact Email: career@genrobotics.org

Job Title: Robotic Software Engineer

Experience Required: 2-5 Years Closing Date: 27 May 2026 Published On: 01 May 2026

Brief Description

We are seeking a Robotic Software Engineer to develop autonomy, perception, and control software for advanced dynamic mapping-based pick-and-place robots. In this role, you will design safety-critical autonomy functions such as perception, obstacle avoidance, adaptive path planning, and intelligent assistive controls to enhance robot performance and reliability. Collaboration with cross-disciplinary teams in hardware, controls, and AI is essential to deliver robotic systems that operate safely in dynamic environments.

Responsibilities

  • Design and implement trajectory planning, grasp planning, collision avoidance, and manipulation pipelines.
  • Develop and tune inverse kinematics, motion primitives, and real-time arm control for high-speed pick-and-place tasks.
  • Build adaptive manipulation behaviors for moving objects, uncertain environments, or varying payloads.
  • Implement global and local motion planners for dynamic work cells.
  • Design robotic ADAS-like features (obstacle detection, collision avoidance, autonomous navigation, human-robot interaction).
  • Develop algorithms for sensor fusion, real-time perception, and environment understanding using LiDAR, radar, depth cameras, and IMUs.
  • Create path planning and localization software for indoor/outdoor platforms.
  • Collaborate with hardware engineers to integrate sensors and validate performance.
  • Ensure safe operation via functional safety principles.
  • Stay updated on robotics, autonomous systems, and advanced assistance technologies.
  • Document software designs, code, and test procedures.

Preferred Skills

  • Proficiency in C++ and Python.
  • Extensive experience with ROS/ROS 2.
  • Strong understanding of robotics concepts (kinematics, dynamics, control systems).
  • Expertise in perception algorithms, sensor fusion, computer vision.
  • Experience with SLAM and navigation algorithms.
  • Familiarity with deep learning frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow).
  • Sensor integration experience (LiDAR, radar, cameras, ultrasonic, GPS/IMU).
  • Knowledge of embedded systems and RTOS.
  • Experience with Git and Gazebo simulation tools.

Added Advantage

  • Experience with industrial robotic arms and manipulators.
  • Knowledge of web technologies for robotic interfaces.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor's/Master's in Computer Science, Robotics, Electrical Engineering, or related fields.
  • Minimum 2 years of professional robotics software development experience.
  • Location: Technopark, Thiruvananthapuram

Apply Here: [Link to apply]
summary: Develop autonomy and control software for dynamic robots with 2+ years experience in C++, ROS, and sensor integration. Requires expertise in perception, path planning, and real-time systems.

job_description:
GENROBOTIC INNOVATIONS (P) Ltd

Location: Technopark, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala, India Website: http://www.genrobotics.org Job Title: Reinforcement Learning (RL) Engineer Experience Required: 2–4 Years Closing Date: 28, May 2026 Contact Email: career@genrobotics.org

Brief Description

We are seeking a highly skilled Reinforcement Learning (RL) Engineer to develop, implement, and optimize RL algorithms for real-world and simulation-based applications. The ideal candidate has strong foundations in machine learning, deep learning, control systems, and hands-on experience deploying RL models in production or embedded systems.

Responsibilities

  • Design, implement, and optimize RL algorithms such as PPO, SAC, TD3, DQN, A3C, TRPO, etc.
  • Develop custom reward functions, policy architectures, and learning workflows.
  • Conduct research on state-of-the-art RL techniques and integrate into product or research pipelines.
  • Build or work with simulation environments such as PyBullet, Mujoco, IsaacGym, CARLA, Gazebo, or custom environments.
  • Integrate RL agents with environment APIs, physics engines, and sensor models.
  • Deploy RL models on real systems (e.g., robots, embedded hardware, autonomous platforms).
  • Optimize RL policies for latency, robustness, and real-world constraints.
  • Work with control engineers to integrate RL with classical controllers (PID, MPC, etc.).
  • Run large-scale experiments, hyperparameter tuning, and ablation studies.
  • Analyze model performance, failure cases, and implement improvements.
  • Collaborate with robotics, perception, simulation, and software engineering teams.
  • Document algorithms, experiments, and results for internal and external stakeholders.

Preferred Skills

  • Strong expertise in Python, with experience in ML frameworks like PyTorch or TensorFlow.
  • Deep understanding of:
  • Markov Decision Processes (MDP)
  • Policy & value-based RL
  • Deep learning architectures (CNN, RNN, Transformers)
  • Control theory fundamentals
  • Experience with RL libraries (stable-baselines3, RLlib, CleanRL, etc.).
  • Experience with simulation tools or robotics middleware (ROS/ROS2, Gazebo).

Added Advantage

  • Experience in robotics, mechatronic, or embedded systems.
  • Experience with C++ for performance-critical applications.
  • Knowledge of GPU acceleration, CUDA, or distributed training.
  • Experience bringing RL models from simulation to real-world (Sim2Real).
  • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).

Experience

  • 2–4 years of hands-on RL experience (academic or industry).
  • Published RL research papers (optional but preferred).

Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s/Master’s/PhD in Computer Science, Robotics, AI, Machine Learning, or related field.
summary: Develop and optimize reinforcement learning algorithms for real-world applications. Requires Python, deep learning, and simulation tools with 2-4 years of experience.

job_description:
GENROBOTIC INNOVATIONS (P) Ltd

Location: Thejaswini Building, Technopark, Trivandrum, Kerala, India, 695581 Website: www.genrobotics.org Job Title: Senior Embedded System Engineer (3-4 Years) Closing Date: 20, May 2026 Published Date: 01, May 2026 Contact Email: career@genrobotics.org

Brief Description

We are seeking a passionate and experienced Embedded Systems Engineer (3-4 Years) to join our growing robotics team. You will play a pivotal role in leading the design, development, and implementation of embedded systems for our next-generation robots. This is an opportunity to be at the forefront of robotics innovation and make a real impact on the future.

Duties & Responsibilities

  • Provide technical leadership, training, and mentorship to a team of embedded systems engineers.
  • Define technical direction for embedded systems projects, ensuring alignment with overall robot functionalities.
  • Design, develop, and maintain embedded firmware using C, C++, and Assembly.
  • Implement RTOS concepts such as FreeRTOS and Embedded Linux.
  • Collaborate with hardware engineers on hardware design, circuit analysis, and interfacing.
  • Select and integrate electronic components, sensors, and actuators.
  • Utilize debugging tools like oscilloscopes, logic analyzers, and multimeters for troubleshooting.
  • Develop and maintain communication protocols (UART, SPI, I2C, CAN, Ethernet, Bluetooth, USB).
  • Implement version control systems (Git) for code management.
  • Write and execute comprehensive test plans for embedded systems.
  • Lead the design, development, and deployment of embedded systems projects.
  • Stay up-to-date on the latest advancements in embedded systems technologies.

Preferred Skills

  • Strong understanding of microcontrollers, microprocessors, and digital signal processors.
  • Familiarity with various embedded system architectures.
  • Knowledge of 32/16/8-bit microcontrollers.
  • Proficiency in C, C++, and Assembly programming languages.
  • Experience with scripting languages like Python for test automation.
  • Hands-on experience with hardware design, circuit analysis, and interfacing.
  • Familiarity with electronic components, sensors, and actuators.
  • Proficiency with IDEs (e.g., Arduino IDE, STMCubeIDE, VS Code).
  • Proficiency with PCB design software (e.g., KiCad).
  • Experience using debugging tools like oscilloscopes, logic analyzers, and multimeters.
  • Understanding of communication protocols (UART, SPI, I2C, CAN, Ethernet, Bluetooth, USB).
  • Knowledge of version control systems (Git).
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills.
  • Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
  • Experience leading and mentoring junior engineers.
  • Exposure to various industry applications of embedded systems (e.g., automotive, healthcare, IoT).
  • Added Advantage: Proficiency in MATLAB.

Qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field (Master's degree a plus).
  • Experience: 3-4 Years
  • Location: Technopark, Thiruvanathapuram

Application Link: Click here to Apply
summary: Senior Embedded Systems Engineer with 3-4 years of experience in designing firmware, RTOS, and communication protocols for robotics innovation.

job_description:
GENROBOTIC INNOVATIONS (P) Ltd

Location: Thejaswini Building, Technopark, Trivandrum, Kerala, India, 695581 Website: http://www.genrobotics.org Job Title: Senior Mechanical Design Engineer (4 - 6 Years) Closing Date: 20, May 2026 Published Date: 01, May 2026 Contact Email: career@genrobotics.org

Brief Description

We are seeking a highly skilled and innovative Senior Mechanical Design Engineer with a minimum of 4 years of experience to join our dynamic Research & Development team. The ideal candidate will have a comprehensive background in mechanical design and engineering principles, with a demonstrated ability to develop and implement cutting-edge products and solutions. The role involves the end-to-end design process, from initial concept through to production, including the prototyping and testing of mechanical components and systems to meet project requirements and company standards.

Responsibilities

  • Generate innovative mechanical designs that meet project specifications and performance criteria.
  • Employ CAD software (SolidWorks, SolidEdge) to create detailed 3D models and engineering drawings using ASME Y14.5 standard.
  • Conduct brainstorming sessions and design reviews to develop creative solutions to complex mechanical challenges.
  • Perform feasibility studies to evaluate the technical and economic viability of new product ideas.
  • Develop product specifications and requirements based on market research and stakeholder inputs.
  • Create and maintain BOMs associated with engineering drawings.
  • Develop detailed designs of mechanical components and assemblies, optimizing for manufacturability, assembly, and performance.
  • Work closely with manufacturing teams to develop production processes and identify opportunities for automation and cost reduction.
  • Create tolerance analyses and conduct FMEA (Failure Mode and Effects Analysis) to ensure robustness.
  • Build physical prototypes using techniques like CNC machining, 3D printing, and traditional fabrication methods.
  • Conduct thorough testing of prototypes using analytical tools (FEA) to simulate operating conditions.
  • Refine designs based on test feedback and performance data.
  • Integrate mechanical systems with electrical, software, and other subsystems.
  • Identify opportunities for design improvements (performance, weight reduction, cost savings).
  • Develop detailed project plans, track progress, and adjust timelines as needed.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams for product launch, including production ramp-up and quality control.
  • Prepare comprehensive technical documentation and maintain records of design iterations.
  • Implement best practices in design processes and contribute to internal design standards.
  • Stay current with advancements in mechanical engineering and evaluate new tools/technologies.

Preferred Skills

  • Knowledge of Mechanical design with a focus on theory and design aspects.
  • Experience with 3D CAD software (SolidWorks, SolidEdge).
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects independently in a fast-paced environment.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

Qualifications

  • Masters/Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering.
  • 4 - 6 Years of experience.
  • Location: Technopark, Thiruvanathapuram.

Apply: Click here to Apply
summary: Senior Mechanical Design Engineer with 4-6 years of experience in CAD software (SolidWorks, SolidEdge) and product development, focusing on innovative design and cross-functional collaboration.

job_description:
GENROBOTIC INNOVATIONS (P) Ltd

Location: Thejaswini Building, Technopark, Trivandrum, Kerala, India, 695581 Website: http://www.genrobotics.org

Job Title: Battery Management System Engineer

Experience Required: 2+ Years Closing Date: 15, May 2026 Published Date: 01, May 2026 Contact Email: career@genrobotics.org

Brief Description

We are seeking a Battery Management System Engineer with 2+ years of experience in BMS architecture, Li-Ion battery assembly (cylindrical, pouch, prismatic cells), and LV/HV battery system handling. The role involves:

  • Developing and integrating processes in New Product Development Stage (NPDS), including DFA, DFS, DVA, ergonomics, and cable routing.
  • Designing BMS architecture with expertise in SOC, SOH, cell balancing, fault detection, safety controls, and protection algorithms.
  • Implementing thermal management, energy management, and life optimization algorithms.
  • Proficiency in communication protocols (RS485, Modbus, CAN) and custom protocol integration.
  • Preparing SOPs, work instructions, and quality checklists.
  • Familiarity with battery chemistries (NMC, LiFePO4) and functional safety standards (ISO 26262).

Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and test embedded software/firmware for BMS applications.
  • Integrate/configure BMS hardware (microcontrollers, sensors, CAN, UART, SPI, I2C).
  • Implement SOC/SOH/cell balancing algorithms.
  • Collaborate with hardware engineers on PCB layouts and co-validation.
  • Support cross-functional teams for electrical/thermal/mechanical compliance.
  • Develop diagnostic tools and root-cause analysis for field issues.
  • Document software design, validation protocols, and change logs.

Preferred Skills

  • Solid understanding of Battery Management Systems (BMS) architecture, components, and safety features.
  • Experience in Li-Ion battery assembly (cylindrical, pouch, prismatic cells), adhesive dispensing, and quality checkpoints.
  • Knowledge of LV/HV battery system handling.
  • Expertise in BMS architecture, fault detection, and safety controls.
  • Proficiency in RS485/Modbus/CAN protocols.
  • Ability to implement custom communication protocols.

Added Advantages

  • Knowledge of functional safety standards (e.g., ISO 26262).

Qualifications

  • B Tech in ECE/EEE
  • 2+ years of experience in battery management systems
  • Location: Technopark, Thiruvananthapuram

Apply: [Click here to Apply]
summary: Design and integrate BMS systems with expertise in Li-Ion batteries, protocols, and safety standards. Requires 2+ years of experience in BMS development and validation.
